title: Writing numerical inequalities
description: Practice writing inequalities to describe real-world situations.

assessment_items.question_content:
The temperature is $-18.2~^{\circ}\text{C}$ in South Dakota and $-9.7~^{\circ} \text{C}$ in Minnesota. 

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the temperatures?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two temperatures on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$-9.7 \pink> -18.2$ because $-9.7$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-18.2$.
The temperature is $\pink{\text{warmer}}$ in Minnesota than in South Dakota because $-9.7$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than  $-18.2$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-9.7 > -18.2$


- The temperature is warmer in Minnesota than in South Dakota.

choices.content: The temperature is warmer in South Dakota than in Minnesota.
The temperature is warmer in Minnesota than in South Dakota.

assessment_items.question_content:
Desert Shores has an elevation of $-61.2$ meters. Shatt al Gharsah has an elevation of $-17.1$ meters. Note that both places have negative elevations because they are below sea level. 

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the elevations?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two elevations on a number line.


[[☃ image 1]]
$-61.2 \pink< -17.1$ because $-61.2$ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $-17.1$.
Desert Shores has a $\pink{\text{lower}}$ elevation than Shatt al Gharsah because $-61.2$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than  $-17.1$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-61.2 < -17.1$


- Desert Shores has a lower elevation than Shatt al Gharsah.

choices.content: Desert Shores has a lower elevation than Shatt al Gharsah.
Shatt al Gharsah has a lower elevation than Desert Shores.

assessment_items.question_content:
The Sea Lions are facing off against The Otters in fantasy football. The Sea Lions scored $-12$ points this week. The Otters scored $-17$ points this week.

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the scores?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
[[☃ image 1]]

Let's place the two scores on a number line.

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/fd99523d2a0beffd8fa4ea8b78815325.png)
$-12 \pink> -17$ because $-12$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-17$.
The Sea Lions' score was $\pink{\text{higher}}$ than The Otters' score because $-12$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-17$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-12 > -17$


- The Sea Lions' score was higher than The Otters' score.

choices.content: The Otters' score was higher than The Sea Lions' score.
The Sea Lions' score was higher than The Otters' score.

assessment_items.question_content:
Nathaniel, a meteorologist, keeps track of the amount of rain each year relative to the amount of rain in $2000$. Two years of data are shown in the table below. 

Year | Amount of rain relative to $2000$ (in $\text{cm}$)
- | :-: 
$2004$ | $27$
$2005$ | $-49$



**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the relative amounts of rain?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two relative amounts of rain on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$-49 \pink< 27$ because $-49$ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $27$.
There was $\pink{\text{less}}$ rain in $2005$ than in $2004$ because $-49$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than $27$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-49 < 27$


- There was less rain in $2005$ than in $2004$.

choices.content: There was less rain in $2005$ than in $2004$.
There was less rain in $2004$ than in $2005$.

assessment_items.question_content:
LeBron keeps track of events in his life relative to the year he was born. Relative to when he was born, his brother was born in year $-3$, and his family moved in year $7$. 

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the relative years?** 

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two relative years on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$7 \pink> -3$ because $7$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-3$.
LeBron's family moved $\pink{\text{after}}$ his brother was born because $7$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-3$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $7 > -3$


- LeBron's family moved after his brother was born.

choices.content: LeBron's brother was born after his family moved.
LeBron's family moved after his brother was born.

assessment_items.question_content:
Sophia has $\$146.32$ in her savings account. She has $-\$212.19$ in her checking account.

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the account values?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two account values on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$-212.19 \pink< 146.32$ because $-212.19$ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $146.32$.
Sophia's checking account has a $\pink{\text{lower}}$ account value than her savings account because $-212.19$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than  $146.32$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-212.19 < 146.32$


- Sophia's checking account has a lower account value than her savings account.

choices.content: Sophia's checking account has a lower account value than her savings account.
Sophia's savings account has a lower account value than her checking account.

assessment_items.question_content:
Lilou's Diner has a value of $1.73$ million dollars. Mitch's Bed and Breakfast has a value of $-0.29$ million dollars.

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the company values?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two company values on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$1.73 \pink> -0.29$ because $1.73$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-0.29$.
Lilou's Diner has a $\pink{\text{greater}}$ value than Mitch's Bed and Breakfast because $1.73$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-0.29$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $1.73 > -0.29$


- Lilou's Diner has a greater value than Mitch's Bed and Breakfast.

choices.content: Lilou's Diner has a greater value than Mitch's Bed and Breakfast.
Mitch's Bed and Breakfast has a greater value than Lilou's Diner.

assessment_items.question_content:
The table below shows the number of text messages Eduardo sent during two months. Negative values represent the number of text messages he was under his allotted amount, and positive values represent the number of text messages he was over. 

Month | Number of text messages
- | :-: 
April | $53$
May | $-18$




**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the relative numbers of text messages?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two relative numbers of text messages on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$-18 \pink< 53$ because $-18$ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $53$.
Eduardo sent $\pink{\text{fewer}}$ text messages during May than April  because $-18$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than $53$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-18 < 53$


- Eduardo sent fewer text messages during May than April.

choices.content: Eduardo sent fewer text messages during May than April.
Eduardo sent fewer text messages during April than May.

assessment_items.question_content:
A red bird is flying at an elevation of $17 \dfrac19$ meters. A blue bird is flying at an elevation of $10 \dfrac35$ meters.

**Which one of the following inequalities correctly compares the elevations?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two elevations on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$17 \dfrac19 \pink> 10 \dfrac35$ because $17 \dfrac19$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $10 \dfrac35$.
The red bird is flying at a $\pink{\text{higher}}$ elevation than the blue bird because $17 \dfrac19$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $10 \dfrac35$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $17 \dfrac19 > 10 \dfrac35$


- The red bird is flying at a higher elevation than the blue bird.

choices.content: $17 \dfrac19 > 10 \dfrac35$
$10 \dfrac35 > 17 \dfrac19$
The red bird is flying at a higher elevation than the blue bird.
The blue bird is flying at a higher elevation than the red bird.

assessment_items.question_content:
The temperature is $-5.5~^{\circ}\text{C}$ in New York and $-11.1~^{\circ} \text{C}$ in Iowa. 

**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares the temperatures.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two temperatures on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$-5.5 \pink> -11.1$ because $-5.5$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-11.1$.
The temperature is $\pink{\text{warmer}}$ in New York than in Iowa because $-5.5$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-11.1$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-5.5 > -11.1$


- The temperature is warmer in New York than in Iowa.

choices.content: The temperature is warmer in Iowa than in New York.
The temperature is warmer in New York than in Iowa.

assessment_items.question_content:
The Cayman trough has an elevation of $-7\dfrac{7}{10}$ kilometers.  The Mariana trench has an elevation of $-10\dfrac{9}{10}$ kilometers. Note that both places have negative elevations because they are below sea level.


**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares the elevations.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two elevations on a number line.

[[☃ image 1]]
$- 10 \dfrac{9}{10} \pink< - 7 \dfrac{7}{10}$ because $- 10 \dfrac{9}{10} $ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $- 7 \dfrac{7}{10}$.
The Mariana trench has a $\pink{\text{lower}}$ elevation than the Cayman trough because $- 10 \dfrac{9}{10}$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than $- 7 \dfrac{7}{10}$ .

The correct answers are given below:

- $- 10 \dfrac{9}{10} < - 7 \dfrac{7}{10}$ 


- The Mariana trench has a lower elevation than the Cayman trough.

choices.content: The Cayman trough has a lower elevation than the Mariana trench.
The Mariana trench has a lower elevation than the Cayman trough.

assessment_items.question_content:
The Red Robins are facing off against the Aliens in fantasy football. The Red Robins scored $39$ points this week. The Aliens scored $-25$ points this week.

[[☃ orderer 1]]

$39 \pink> -25$ because $39$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-25$.
The Red Robins' score was $\pink{\text{higher}}$ than the Aliens' score because $39$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-25$.

- The Red Robins' score was higher than the Aliens' score.

The Aliens' score was higher than the Red Robins' score.

assessment_items.question_content:
Manueala scored $-4 \dfrac12$ points relative to her season average against the China Dragons. She scored $1 \dfrac12$ points relative to her season average against the Canada Moose.

**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares Manueala's relative numbers of points.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two relative numbers of points on a number line.

[[☃ image 1]]
$1 \dfrac12\pink> -4 \dfrac12$ because $1 \dfrac12$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-4 \dfrac12$.
Manueala scored $\pink{\text{more}}$ points against the Canada Moose than against the China Dragons because $1 \dfrac12$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-4 \dfrac12$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $1 \dfrac12> -4 \dfrac12$


- Manueala scored more points against the Canada Moose than against the China Dragons.

choices.content: Manueala scored more points against the China Dragons than against the Canada Moose.
Manueala scored more points against the Canada Moose than against the China Dragons.

assessment_items.question_content:
Hunter, a meteorologist, keeps track of the amount of rain each year relative to the amount of rain in $1900$. Two years of data are shown in the table below. 

Year | Amount of rain relative to $1900$ (in $\text{cm}$)
- | :-: 
$1945$ | $-19$
$1946$ | $36$


**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares the relative amounts of rain.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two relative amounts of rain on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]
$-19 \pink< 36$ because $-19$ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $36$.
There was $\pink{\text{less}}$ rain in $1945$ than in $1946$ because $-19$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than $36$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-19 < 36$

- There was less rain in $1945$ than in $1946$.

choices.content: There was less rain in $1945$ than in $1946$.
There was less rain in $1946$ than in $1945$.

assessment_items.question_content:
Hailey has $\$117.39$ in her savings account. She has $-\$121.06$ in her checking account.

**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares the account values.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

$117.39 \pink> -121.06$ because $117.39$ is to the $\pink{\text{right}}$ of $-121.06$.
Hailey's savings account has a $\pink{\text{higher}}$ account value than her checking account because $117.39$ is $\pink{\text{greater}}$ than $-121.06$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $117.39 > -121.06$


- Hailey's savings account has a higher account value than her checking account.

assessment_items.question_content:
Ming's Lodge has a value of $-0.51$ million dollars.   Felipe's Restaurant has a value of $-0.89$ million dollars.

**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares the company values.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

Felipe's Restaurant has $\pink{\text{less}}$ value than Ming's Lodge because $-0.89$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than $-0.51$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-0.89 < -0.51$


- Felipe's Restaurant has less value than Ming's Lodge.

assessment_items.question_content:
A marvellous spatuletail is flying at an elevation of $4 \dfrac29$ meters. An Asian crested ibis is flying at an elevation of $10 \dfrac14$ meters.

**Drag the white cards onto the gray rectangle to write an inequality that correctly compares the elevations.**

[[☃ orderer 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Let's place the two elevations on a number line.


[[☃ image 1]]
$4 \dfrac29 \pink< 10 \dfrac14$ because $4 \dfrac29$ is to the $\pink{\text{left}}$ of $10 \dfrac14$.
The marvellous spatuletail is flying at a $\pink{\text{lower}}$ elevation than the Asian crested ibis because $4 \dfrac29$ is $\pink{\text{less}}$ than $10 \dfrac14$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $4 \dfrac29 < 10 \dfrac14$


- The marvellous spatuletail is flying at a lower elevation than the Asian crested ibis.

choices.content: The marvellous spatuletail is flying at a lower elevation than the Asian crested ibis.
The Asian crested ibis is flying at a lower elevation than the marvellous spatuletail.

assessment_items.question_content:
Giovanna has a score of $-5$ in Canasta. Vera's score is $-10$. 

**Write an inequality that correctly compares the scores.**

$\qquad$[[☃ expression 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two scores on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]

Either of the following inequalities will work:

$-10 < -5$ because $-10$ is to the left of $-5$.

$-5 > -10$ because $-5$ is to the right of $-10$.
Giovanna's score is higher than Vera's score because $-5$ is greater than $-10$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-10 < -5$ or $-5 > -10$


-  Giovanna's score is higher than Vera's score.

choices.content: Giovanna's score is higher than Vera's score.
Vera's score is higher than Giovanna's score.

assessment_items.question_content:
The temperature on Tuesday was $-5~^{\circ}\text{C}$. The temperature on Wednesday was $5~^{\circ}\text{C}$.

**Write an inequality that correctly compares the temperatures.**

$\qquad$[[☃ expression 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two temperatures on a number line.


[[☃ image 1]]

Either of the following inequalities will work:

$-5 < 5$ because $-5$ is to the left of $5$.

$5 > -5$ because $5$ is to the right of $-5$.
The temperature was higher on Wednesday than on Tuesday because $5$ is greater than $-5$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-5 < 5$ or $5 > -5$


-  The temperature was higher on Wednesday than on Tuesday.

choices.content: The temperature was higher on Tuesday than on Wednesday.
The temperature was higher on Wednesday than on Tuesday.

assessment_items.question_content:
The electric charge of magnesium  is $2$. The electric charge of potassium is $1$. 

**Write an inequality that correctly compares the charges.**

$\qquad$[[☃ expression 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two charges on a number line.


[[☃ image 1]]

Either of the following inequalities will work:

$1 < 2$ because $1$ is to the left of $2$.

$2 > 1$ because $2$ is to the right of $1$.
Magnesium's charge is more positive than potassium's charge because $2$ is greater than $1$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $1 < 2$ or $2 > 1$


-  Magnesium's charge is more positive than potassium's charge.

choices.content: Magnesium's charge is more positive than potassium's charge.
Potassium's charge is more positive than magnesium's charge.

assessment_items.question_content:
Bajo del Gualicho has an elevation of $-72$ meters. Lago Enriquillo has an elevation of $-46$ meters. Note that both places have negative elevations because they are below sea level. 

**Write an inequality that correctly compares the elevations.**

$\qquad$[[☃ expression 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two elevations on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]

Either of the following inequalities will work:

$-72 < -46$ because $-72$ is to the left of $-46$.

$-46 > -72$ because $-46$ is to the right of $-72$.
Lago Enriquillo has a higher elevation than Bajo del Gualicho because $-46$ is greater than $-72$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-72 < -46$ or $-46 > -72$


-  Lago Enriquillo has a higher elevation than Bajo del Gualicho.

choices.content: Bajo del Gualicho has a higher elevation than Lago Enriquillo.
Lago Enriquillo has a higher elevation than Bajo del Gualicho.

assessment_items.question_content:
Wang Xiu Ying has $109$ dollars in her savings account. She has $-21$ dollars in her checking account.

**Write an inequality that correctly compares the account values.**

$\qquad$[[☃ expression 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two account values on a number line.



[[☃ image 1]]

Either of the following inequalities will work:

$-21 < 109$ because $-21$ is to the left of $109$.

$109 > -21$ because $109$ is to the right of $-21$.
Wang Xiu Ying's checking account has a lower account value than her savings account because $-21$ is less than $109$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $-21 < 109$ or $109 > -21$


-  Wang Xiu Ying's checking account has a lower account value than her savings account.

choices.content: Wang Xiu Ying's checking account has a lower account value than her savings account.
Wang Xiu Ying's savings account has a lower account value than her checking account.

assessment_items.question_content:
An eagle is flying at an elevation $15$ meters above the ground. A gyrfalcon is flying at an elevation $23$ meters above the ground.

**Write an inequality that correctly compares the elevations.**

$\qquad$[[☃ expression 1]]

**Which one of the following descriptions is correct?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Let's place the two elevations on a number line.


[[☃ image 1]]

Either of the following inequalities will work:

$15 < 23$ because $15$ is to the left of $23$.

$23 > 15$ because $23$ is to the right of $15$.
The eagle is flying at a lower elevation than the gyrfalcon because $15$ is less than $23$.

The correct answers are given below:

- $15 < 23$ or $23 > 15$ 


-  The eagle is flying at a lower elevation than the gyrfalcon.

choices.content: The eagle is flying at a lower elevation than the gyrfalcon.
The gyrfalcon is flying at a lower elevation than the eagle.
